---
title: Bridge2AI
alias: &ALIAS bridge2ai
href: https://bridge2ai.org/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

Bridge2AI is an NIH Common Fund program generating flagship AI-ready biomedical datasets with accompanying ethical frameworks, standards, and best practices for responsible AI development.

## Key Features

- Funds four grand challenge projects producing large, diverse, AI-ready biomedical datasets
- Develops FAIR data standards, metadata schemas, and ethical AI guidelines for biomedical data
- Covers domains including clinical voice data, electrophysiology, cell biology, and clinical trials
- Provides open-access toolkits for data harmonization, quality assessment, and bias mitigation
- Emphasizes diversity and inclusion in data collection to reduce AI model bias

## Use Cases in Research

- Using Bridge2AI frameworks to design FAIR and AI-ready infectious disease datasets
- Adopting Bridge2AI ethical guidelines for responsible AI development in AMR diagnostics
- Accessing harmonized clinical datasets for training AI models on infectious disease outcomes
- Applying Bridge2AI metadata standards to improve interoperability of microbiome data
- Benchmarking AI readiness of in-house datasets against Bridge2AI standards and rubrics

## Getting Started

Visit [Bridge2AI](https://bridge2ai.org/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
